channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: U.S. attempt to open Strait of Hormuz tests fragile Iran war ceasefire
item.description: The Iran war risked reigniting after the U.S. tried to force open the Strait of Hormuz, though a ceasefire seemed to be holding Tuesday even after the United Arab Emirates said Iran fired missiles and drones at it.
item.content:encoded:
The Iran war risked reigniting after the U.S. tried to force open the Strait of Hormuz, though a ceasefire seemed to be holding Tuesday even after the United Arab Emirates said Iran fired missiles and drones at it.

(Image credit: Amirhosein Khorgooi/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: This flashy group of Portland mall-walkers puts neon pep into step
item.description: Krista Catwood wanted a fun way to exercise, so she started a mall-walking group whose unofficial costume was 1980s garb. The festive, all-ages event has exploded in popularity over the past year.
item.content:encoded:
Krista Catwood wanted a fun way to exercise, so she started a mall-walking group whose unofficial costume was 1980s garb. The festive, all-ages event has exploded in popularity over the past year.

(Image credit: Celeste Noche for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep

item.title: Minneapolis immigrants still feeling the sting of Trump's largest crackdown yet
item.description: The impact of Operation Metro Surge in the Twin Cities can still be felt, even three months after it ended. For immigrants, the impact has been devastating — many are at risk of losing their homes and business, and some are dealing with mental health challenges.
item.content:encoded:
The impact of Operation Metro Surge in the Twin Cities can still be felt, even three months after it ended. For immigrants, the impact has been devastating — many are at risk of losing their homes and business, and some are dealing with mental health challenges.

(Image credit: Tim Evans for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sergio Martínez-Beltrán

item.title: Primary elections in Ohio, Indiana offer latest temperature check on Trump popularity
item.description: The president seeks to oust Indiana Republicans who blocked a redistricting push in that state, while growing dissatisfaction with Trump's agenda gives Democrats an opening in Ohio.
item.content:encoded:
The president seeks to oust Indiana Republicans who blocked a redistricting push in that state, while growing dissatisfaction with Trump's agenda gives Democrats an opening in Ohio.

(Image credit: Jon Cherry)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: An explosion at a fireworks plant in China kills at least 26 people, state media says
item.description: Authorities said search and rescue at a fireworks plant in a central Chinese province has largely been completed, but verification of the casualties and identification of the victims are still underway.
item.content:encoded:
Authorities said search and rescue at a fireworks plant in a central Chinese province has largely been completed, but verification of the casualties and identification of the victims are still underway.

(Image credit: Chen Sihan/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Cruise ship waiting for help after 3 people died in a suspected hantavirus outbreak
item.description: A cruise ship with nearly 150 people aboard was waiting for help off the coast of Cape Verde in the Atlantic Ocean after three passengers died in a suspected outbreak of the rare hantavirus.
item.content:encoded:
A cruise ship with nearly 150 people aboard was waiting for help off the coast of Cape Verde in the Atlantic Ocean after three passengers died in a suspected outbreak of the rare hantavirus.

(Image credit: Arilson Almeida)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Russia declares a truce in Ukraine to mark Victory Day
item.description: Russia declared a unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine for Friday and Saturday to mark the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II, but threatened to strike back at Kyiv if it tries to disrupt festivities.
item.content:encoded:
Russia declared a unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine for Friday and Saturday to mark the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II, but threatened to strike back at Kyiv if it tries to disrupt festivities.

(Image credit: Mikhail Metzel)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Wyoming lawmakers use pro-natalist arguments to justify proposed new partial abortion ban
item.description: Wyoming lawmakers say tight new restrictions on abortion are needed to grow the state's population. Demographers and others say economic conditions are more to blame for an exodus of young people.
item.content:encoded:
Wyoming lawmakers say tight new restrictions on abortion are needed to grow the state's population. Demographers and others say economic conditions are more to blame for an exodus of young people.

(Image credit: Jamie Schwaberow)
item.dc:creator: Hanna Merzbach

item.title: See the looks from the 2026 Met Gala red carpet
item.description: Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.
item.content:encoded:
Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Emily Bogle

item.title: Hotels have a big World Cup problem: Bookings are running far below projections
item.description: Nearly 80% of hotels surveyed by a body representing the industry reported bookings were running below projections — a worrisome sign with only weeks to go before the World Cup.
item.content:encoded:
Nearly 80% of hotels surveyed by a body representing the industry reported bookings were running below projections — a worrisome sign with only weeks to go before the World Cup.

(Image credit: Jamie Squire)
item.dc:creator: Rafael Nam
